func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) buildTx(ctx context.Context, query []gormplus.QueryOption) dao.I{{.ModelName}}EntityDo {
	if len(query) == 0 {
		return dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).Order(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.{{.PrimaryKeyField}}.Desc())
	}
	q := query[0]
	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx)
	if len(q.Cond) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Where(q.Cond...)
	}
	if len(q.Select) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Select(q.Select...)
	}
	if len(q.Order) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Order(q.Order...)
	} else {
		tx = tx.Order(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.{{.PrimaryKeyField}}.Desc())
	}
	if q.Limit != nil {
		tx = tx.Limit(*q.Limit)
	}
	return tx
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) buildWrapperTx(ctx context.Context, fn func(gormplus.IGenWrapper[dao.I{{.ModelName}}EntityDo]), orderFields []field.Expr) dao.I{{.ModelName}}EntityDo {
	tx := gormplus.GenWrap(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx))
	if fn != nil {
		fn(tx)
	}
	entityDo := tx.Apply()
	if len(orderFields) > 0 {
		entityDo = entityDo.Order(orderFields...)
	} else {
		entityDo = entityDo.Order(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.{{.PrimaryKeyField}}.Desc())
	}
	return entityDo
}

	limit := int(pageSize)
	return r.buildTx(ctx, query).FindByPage(offset, limit)
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) FindByIdList(ctx context.Context, {{.ModelNameLower}}Ids []int64, orderFields ...field.Expr) ([]*{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity, error) {
	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).Where(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.{{.PrimaryKeyField}}.In({{.ModelNameLower}}Ids...))
	if len(orderFields) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Order(orderFields...)
	}
	return tx.Find()
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) Exists(ctx context.Context, cond ...gen.Condition) (bool, error) {
	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx)
	if len(cond) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Where(cond...)
	}
	cnt, err := tx.Count()
	if err != nil {
		return false, err
	}
	return cnt > 0, nil
}

	tx := gormplus.GenWrap(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx))
	if fn != nil {

	}

		return false, err

	return cnt > 0, nil

	if len(cond) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Where(cond...)

	return tx.Count()

	tx := gormplus.GenWrap(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx))
	if fn != nil {
		fn(tx)
	}
	return tx.Apply().Count()
